message:
docs(agents): document BLURB_VERSION coupling with AGENT_BLURB marker

Adds comments explaining that bumping BLURB_VERSION requires updating
the HTML marker inside the AGENT_BLURB raw string literal, and that the
agent_blurb_version_matches_constant test guards against mismatch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
